positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a rising phoenix taking flight. The phoenix is stylized with geometric, flowing lines and fiery, vibrant colors (deep crimson, gold, orange). It is depicted in a powerful, soaring silhouette against a contrasting, distressed midnight blue or smoky black background. Composition must be centered and vertically dynamic, maximizing the feeling of ascent and rebirth. Use a high-contrast, distressed linocut or woodcut style print quality. Ensure clean, defined outlines and bold color blocking suitable for screen printing on fabric. Focus on symmetry and dynamic negative space. Studio lighting, graphic design aesthetic, vector illustration style, maximal impact, perfect for textile print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, messy, messy background, signature, logo, letter, smudge, extra limbs, deformed
